Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Requires landlords in the city of New York to provide fire extinguishers in certain dwellings
Summary: Requires landlords of non-owner occupied, one-six family dwellings in the city of New York to provide fire extinguishers in all rented apartments; authorizes the promulgation of standards related thereto.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the multiple dwelling law, in relation to requiring fire extinguishers in certain rented dwellings
